Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 251 

Warning indicator 4 ('utilization day/LOS day indicator' derived after summing up fields on the final 
action claim(s) that comprise the stay; compares resulting utilization day count and length-of-stay [LOS] 
count): 

0 = Utilization day count = LOS day count 
1 = Utilization day count < LOS day count 
2 = Utilization day count > LOS day count
